name: io.github.racehooks/racehooks-mcp
title: RaceHooks
description: F1 race analytics & live timing for AI assistants — webhooks, results, and race simulations.

environmentVariables.name: RACEHOOKS_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your RaceHooks client ID. Get yours at racehooks.io.

environmentVariables.name: RACEHOOKS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.racehooks.io.
